curation_notes: Patch commit 361b6f6 modifies only one non-test source file (mlflow/models/container/__init__.py) and one new test file. The vulnerability is in _install_model_dependencies_to_env() where dependency strings from python_env.yaml are joined and interpolated into a bash -c command via f-string. The fix replaces shell command interpolation with a list-based Popen call using shlex.split() for each dependency. Pre-assigned class command-injection (CWE-77) is correct. No sibling files share the same vulnerability pattern.
